name: Jonathan Vance
bio: Jonathan has over 20 years of experience in technical leadership and executive management. He oversees LUCID's strategic vision and operations, fostering a culture of innovation and engineering excellence.

name: Dr. Aris Thorne
bio: Aris holds a Ph.D. in Computer Science and specializes in distributed systems and AI architectures. He leads our software development practices and technology innovation labs.

name: Melissa Kincaid
bio: Melissa manages day-to-day operations and strategic partner relations. Her experience in scaling operations has helped LUCID establish global client partnerships across three continents.

name: Vikram Malhotra
bio: Vikram is a hands-on technical manager with a track record of shipping complex enterprise applications. He directly oversees our engineering teams, sprint delivery, and QA guidelines.

name: Elena Rostova
bio: Elena leads our manpower acquisition services. She and her team screen thousands of candidates monthly to maintain our elite pool of developer and IT talent.

name: Robert Miller
bio: Robert focuses on post-launch client support and service delivery. He ensures that our developers and consulting services consistently meet and exceed client expectations.
